code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          let c = byte_at(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut m = 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      m = v
    when None
      m = 0
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut removed = false
    for y in remaining
      if y == m and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, y)
      end
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  sorted
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut inter: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
    inter = list.push(inter, x)
  end
end

let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut s = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in sorted
    if first
      s = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      s = "#{s} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(s)
end
